ops.title: Leg-intent plan schema and chain composition
ops.body:
# The leg-intent engine (P2b, commit 9b705434)

`plan.legs` is an ordered list of intents; a journey is any chain of concrete legs satisfying them. Ten adversarial review rounds across four stages; every accepted counterexample is a regression test (1002 pytest, 50 walker tests at ship).

## Schema (trips.py validation, strict)

`{id, origins, dests, mode: award|cash|either, window, stay_nights {min,max}, cabin, optional, buckets, program_sweeps, role}` — conventional ids default `outbound`/`return` on ≤2-leg plans (≥3 legs need explicit ids); first-leg origins default from prefs. `"$origins"` as the whole dests value is THE homeward marker (return semantics, veto exemption, stays gate); explicit dests — home airports included — are open-jaw continuations (lodging via explicit `plan.lodging.checkout`). Open jaw = explicit later-leg origins (they REPLACE chained anchors everywhere). Cash legs: pairs+bridge only, no buckets/program_sweeps/discover, dests concrete or `"$origins"`. Regions in program_sweeps validate against the six capitalized continent names; labels slugify with `-from-` for origin_region; every label component is leaf-grammar pinned. Windows are date-only, ordered, cross-leg sane. Discover dests validate but compile to nothing until P3 (successors need explicit origins). Stored v2 docs (`trip_type`/`hybrid`/`return`/`origins`/`buckets`/`program_sweeps`) reject loudly with the re-declare remedy at every read boundary — no migrations.

## Chaining contract (compile_graph fold)

Per intent: `sweep:<leg-id>[:<bucket>]` + `shortlist:<leg-id>` for award/either; `pairs:<leg-id>` + `bridge:<leg-id>` for cash/either. Chained `endpoint_source` = `{from: prior award shortlist iff prior leg has an award lane (absent otherwise), field: "dest", union: prior leg's declared concrete dests iff it has a cash lane ("$origins" resolves to materialized first-leg origins), override: explicit origins/dests}`. **The pairs node always carries its leg's endpoint_source verbatim** — a conditional carry caused two majors before it died. `_gateway_dates` resolves in one fixed order: override-replace → from ∪ union (stay-shifted predecessor arrivals) → union alone (leg window) → first-position own origins → typed NoData. Empty resolution anywhere = NoData, zero HTTP. Discover legs are chain breaks.

## Composition (journeys.py chain-builder)

Pools per intent (award = shortlist, cash = bridge quotes, either = union); chains extend where a candidate departs the prior candidate's dest or the intent's override origins. Two-leg plans compose EXHAUSTIVELY (byte-identical to the old pairing loop — the degeneracy gate); ≥3-leg plans cheap-rank on (miles, cash cents) under `COMPOSE_BEAM_WIDTH` before any `/trips` expansion, the cut disclosed as `expand.json provenance.truncation.beam_cut` (beam-cut chains are NEVER "no bookable return" leads; partial-chain leads land in P3). Continuity: same-airport boundaries compare full timestamps against the min-connection floor; stay boundaries accept gaps of min..max nights; cross-airport is date-level — never cross-airport clock math. `one_way` is not a composition concept; `_targets_origins` (typed guard included) is only the fit-side return-semantics gate; fit's `_leg_clocks` generalizes over award detail vs cash quote. A quota stop anywhere — lead expansion included — records `quota_stopped`, marks rows `not_run/quota_floor`, and leaves the phase unstamped (resumable).

## Walker (plan-trip.js)

`LEG_SPEC` = `<leg-id>[:<label>]`, charset-pinned, label bound 50 chars (the derived max: source 32 + `-from-` + slugged continent 13). Execution contract untouched: Kahn walk, fresh-skip, retry-once + exit-3 backoff, quota-stop, shape_surprise, JUDGMENT_KINDS. Graph tokens stay tainted — widen grammar bounds only with a computed max, never free-form.

## Traps

- Any `if leg_id == "outbound"` or role-as-logic-key reintroduces the closed shape enum; only first/last position and `$origins`-directedness are structural.
- New request params classify as row-expressible (scope constraint) or lens (`complete=False`) per the generation-semantics doc.
- `_build_chains` materializes the full cross-product before the beam (bounded by shortlist budgets today); the per-step prune belongs with P3's `plan.tuning` beam lift.
- P4 owes: SKILL.md prose reorientation; planning.md lines ~15/52/56 still name removed keys as current mechanics.
ops.when: Touching plan validation or compile_graph in trips.py, journey composition in journeys.py, retrieval keying in sweeps/shortlist/bridge, or the walker grammar in plan-trip.js
